handoff_items.label: Session role state
handoff_items.app_use: Drive the displayed active role and preview role in a future local Orbit app route.

handoff_items.label: Active project binding
handoff_items.app_use: Load the selected project package without introducing network or backend reads.

handoff_items.label: Visible module policy
handoff_items.app_use: Render primary, available and summary-only modules from data instead of hardcoded UI branches.

handoff_items.label: Blocked action policy
handoff_items.app_use: Keep dangerous actions visible but disabled with gate reasons.

handoff_items.label: Role shell visual reference
handoff_items.app_use: Use the generated HTML shell as the visual baseline before a Next route exists.

handoff_items.label: Smoke gates
handoff_items.app_use: Run role state and role shell smokes before interaction or routing changes.

visible_modules.reason: Reference and project knowledge can be inspected locally.
Asset review evidence can be inspected locally.
Current Orbit prototype focuses on the KosmoDesign review handoff.
Prepare is visible as planned context, but not active in this demo shell.
Draw handoff stays summary-only until model-quality review is closed.
Viz is planned and remains blocked from generation in this state.
Publish stays visible but blocked by publish and rights gates.
Zentrale runtime is external to this static repo and only shown as status.

blocked_actions.label: Generate Design
blocked_actions.reason: Context and human-review gates are not approved.

blocked_actions.label: Publish Public
blocked_actions.reason: Publish and rights gates remain blocked in the local demo.

blocked_actions.label: Start Cloud Job
blocked_actions.reason: Cost gate is local-only and external network access is disabled.

checks.label: Role shell active role matches role state.
Role shell selected role matches role state.
Role shell active project matches role state.
Visible module count is preserved in shell manifest.
Blocked action count is preserved in shell manifest.

next_actions: Use this handoff as the contract for the first local/static KosmoOrbit role-state app route.
Keep the next route static and data-read-only until auth/runtime decisions are explicit.
Do not enable generation, publish, uploads or external network actions from this handoff.
